# WeCare Wellness Clinic

> Patient-centered primary care, medical weight loss, women's & men's health, telehealth, hormone therapy, and HIV PrEP - based in Brandon, FL and serving the entire state of Florida via telehealth.

WeCare Wellness Clinic is an independent, board-certified medical practice at 214 W Brandon Blvd, Brandon FL 33511. The practice is led by **Darlyne Georges, MSN, APRN, FNP-C** - a family nurse practitioner with 20+ years of experience in primary care, critical care, and gynecology. Phone: (813) 438-5220. Email: info@wecarewellnessclinic.com. Hours: Mon–Thu 9–5, Fri 9–6, Sat 9–1, Sun closed.

The clinic offers 8 medical services in-person and statewide telehealth across all 67 Florida counties. Same-week appointments are typically available for new patients. Insurance accepted: Aetna, United Healthcare, Medicare, Blue Cross Blue Shield, MultiPlan, and Tricare. Transparent self-pay rates are available for uninsured patients. Average rating: 5★ from 18+ verified Google/BirdEye reviews.

## Core navigation

- [Home](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/): clinic overview, featured services, patient testimonials, why patients choose WeCare
- [About Us](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/about): mission, vision, provider biography of Darlyne Georges, FNP-C
- [New Patients](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/new-patients): what to bring, what to expect on first visit, intake process
- [Insurance Accepted](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/insurance): all accepted plans, verification process, self-pay options
- [Book an Appointment](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/booking): online scheduling for all services
- [Contact](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/contact): location, phone, email, hours, contact form
- [FAQ](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/faq): appointments, insurance, weight loss, telehealth, PrEP, women's & men's health

## Medical services

- [Primary Care](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/primary-care): annual physicals, chronic disease management (diabetes, hypertension, thyroid, asthma), preventive screenings, immunizations, acute illness, in-house labs
- [Medical Weight Loss](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/medical-weight-loss): GLP-1 / Semaglutide (Ozempic, Wegovy) and Tirzepatide (Mounjaro, Zepbound) programs with physician supervision, monthly check-ins, body composition analysis, lab monitoring
- [Women's Health](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/womens-health): well-woman exams, pap smears, hormone replacement therapy (HRT), menopause and perimenopause management, PCOS treatment, birth control counseling, STI testing, UTI treatment
- [Men's Health](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/mens-health): testosterone replacement therapy (TRT), cardiovascular screening, prostate health, sexual health and ED treatment, annual physicals
- [Telehealth](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/telehealth): video visits with board-certified providers, statewide Florida coverage, prescription refills, follow-ups, mental health check-ins, lab result reviews, sick visits
- [IV Hydration & HRT](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/iv-hydration): IV vitamin and hydration infusions, NAD+ therapy, bioidentical hormone replacement, thyroid optimization, adrenal support
- [HIV PrEP & Sexual Health](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/hiv-prep): pre-exposure prophylaxis (Truvada, Descovy, injectable Apretude), comprehensive STI screening, HIV and hepatitis testing, judgment-free care
- [All Services Overview](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/services): one-page summary of every service with imagery and feature lists

## Loyalty rewards program

- [Patient loyalty program](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/loyalty): free to join, 50-point sign-up bonus, 10 points per visit, 1 point per $1 spent on plans, 20-point birthday bonus, 10 points = $1 off any service. Members can sign in to view their personalised dashboard with live points balance, reward roadmap, and redemption options.
- [Loyalty program terms](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/loyalty/terms): full rules including 12-month point expiration, redemption process, eligibility, modifications, and contact info

## Health blog

- [Health blog](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/blog): regularly published articles on primary care, weight loss, women's and men's health, hormone therapy, telehealth, preventive medicine, and lifestyle wellness

## Service area

WeCare serves patients in person from Brandon, Riverview, Valrico, Lithia, Sun City Center, Plant City, Gibsonton, Seffner, Temple Terrace, and east Tampa. Telehealth visits cover all 67 Florida counties.

- [Brandon, FL local landing](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/brandon-fl): primary care doctor in Brandon, FL with neighbourhood-specific information

- [Privacy policy](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/privacy): how we collect and use patient information
- [Terms of use](https://www.wecarewellnessclinic.com/terms): website terms and conditions
